title: Croatian Stew with Creamy Potatoes
description: A hearty, comforting stew from Croatia, made with tender potatoes and a rich, creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the Croatian paprika and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the stew and cook for 2 minutes, until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the creamy sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, until the potatoes are tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
